title: Vessi targets ‘clean’ product data to maximize AEO opportunities
description:
Waterproof apparel and footwear brand Vessi has opted not to block traffic from artificial intelligence (AI) agents, instead leaning into answer engine optimization (AEO). “It can play into our favor,” Ray Hua, director of D2C and lifecycle marketing at Vessi, told Digital Commerce 360. Similar to search engine optimization (SEO), AEO is a practice in […]
The post Vessi targets ‘clean’ product data to maximize AEO opportunities appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Vessi Embraces AI Agents and Answer Engine Optimization for D2C Growth
summary_ko: 방수 의류 브랜드 Vessi가 AI 에이전트 트래픽을 차단하지 않고 AEO(Answer Engine Optimization)를 활용하기로 결정했습니다. D2C 및 라이프사이클 마케팅 디렉터 Ray Hua는 이것이 브랜드에게 유리할 수 있다고 밝혔습니다. 검색 엔진 최적화와 유사한 AEO는 AI 에이전트를 위한 새로운 최적화 전략입니다.
summary_en: Waterproof apparel brand Vessi has decided not to block AI agent traffic and instead leverage Answer Engine Optimization (AEO). Ray Hua, director of D2C and lifecycle marketing at Vessi, stated this could work in the brand's favor. Similar to SEO, AEO represents a new optimization strategy specifically for AI agents.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 에이전트를 적대시하지 말고 새로운 트래픽 소스로 활용해야 합니다. 깨끗한 제품 데이터와 AEO 전략이 AI 검색 시대의 핵심 경쟁력이 될 것입니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should embrace AI agents as new traffic sources rather than blocking them. Clean product data and AEO strategies will become critical competitive advantages in the AI search era.
key_points: Vessi chooses not to block AI agent traffic, viewing it as an opportunity
Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) emerges as new practice similar to SEO
Clean, structured product data becomes crucial for AI agent discovery
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트 시대에는 제품 데이터 품질과 AEO가 D2C 브랜드의 새로운 발견성 전략이 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: In the AI agent era, product data quality and AEO become the new discoverability strategy for D2C brands.

title: Moving on from ‘reach without resonance’: Modern Retail’s Marketing Summit defines new industry directives
description: At last week’s Modern Retail Marketing Summit, brand and retail executives used town-hall and working-group discussions to workshop their next strategies, considering current macroeconomic challenges. These are the practices marketers will be championing moving forward, based on these discussions.
title_en: Modern Retail Marketing Summit Addresses Moving Beyond 'Reach Without Resonance'
summary_ko: Modern Retail Marketing Summit에서 브랜드와 소매업체 임원들이 현재 거시경제적 도전을 고려한 차세대 전략을 논의했습니다. 참석자들은 타운홀과 워킹그룹 토론을 통해 새로운 전략을 수립했습니다. 마케터들이 앞으로 추진할 새로운 관행들이 이번 논의를 통해 정의되었습니다.
summary_en: At Modern Retail Marketing Summit, brand and retail executives discussed next-generation strategies considering current macroeconomic challenges. Participants used town-hall and working-group discussions to develop new strategies. New practices that marketers will champion moving forward were defined through these discussions.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 단순한 도달율보다 고객과의 진정한 공감대 형성에 집중해야 합니다. 거시경제적 어려움 속에서도 효과적인 마케팅 전략 재정의가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must focus on genuine customer resonance rather than mere reach. Effective marketing strategy redefinition is needed despite macroeconomic difficulties.
key_points: Industry moves away from 'reach without resonance' approach
Town-hall discussions shape new marketing directives
Macroeconomic challenges drive strategic reconsiderations
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅의 패러다임이 도달율 중심에서 고객 공감대 형성으로 전환되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing paradigm shifts from reach-focused to customer resonance-centered approach.

title: How former college athlete and Airbnb host turned Love Island fame into widespread success
description: Love Island star TJ Palma had a successful career before his fame, now he's generating even more revenue for his businesses through creator content.
title_en: Love Island Star TJ Palma Leverages Fame for Creator Content Business Success
summary_ko: Love Island 스타 TJ Palma가 방송 출연 이전의 성공적인 커리어를 바탕으로 크리에이터 콘텐츠를 통해 더 많은 수익을 창출하고 있습니다. 전 대학 운동선수이자 Airbnb 호스트였던 그는 현재 인플루언서로서 비즈니스를 확장했습니다. 리얼리티 쇼 명성을 활용한 크리에이터 경제 성공 사례를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Love Island star TJ Palma is generating more revenue through creator content based on his successful pre-fame career. The former college athlete and Airbnb host has now expanded his business as an influencer. This represents a success case of leveraging reality show fame in the creator economy.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 기존 커리어와 명성을 결합한 크리에이터들과의 협업을 고려해야 합니다. 진정성 있는 스토리텔링이 인플루언서 마케팅의 핵심 요소가 되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider collaborating with creators who combine existing careers with fame. Authentic storytelling becomes a key element in influencer marketing.
key_points: Reality show fame successfully converted to creator content revenue
Pre-existing career foundation supports influencer business
Demonstrates authentic creator economy success model
one_line_insight_ko: 진정성 있는 백스토리를 가진 크리에이터가 인플루언서 마케팅에서 더 큰 성공을 거두고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Creators with authentic backstories achieve greater success in influencer marketing.

title: Possible Day 2: Breaking down agentic’s impact on marketing, including multicultural
description: Day 2's interviews featured Molly Battin of The Home Depot, Kirk McDonald of Sundial Media Group, and Omnicom Media's Joanna O'Connell.
title_en: Agentic AI's Transformative Impact on Marketing Including Multicultural Strategies
summary_ko: Possible Day 2에서 에이전틱 AI가 마케팅에 미치는 영향에 대해 논의되었습니다. The Home Depot의 Molly Battin, Sundial Media Group의 Kirk McDonald, Omnicom Media의 Joanna O'Connell이 인터뷰에 참여했습니다. 다문화 마케팅을 포함한 에이전틱 AI의 변혁적 영향이 주요 주제였습니다.
summary_en: Possible Day 2 discussed agentic AI's impact on marketing. Molly Battin from The Home Depot, Kirk McDonald from Sundial Media Group, and Joanna O'Connell from Omnicom Media participated in interviews. The transformative impact of agentic AI including multicultural marketing was a key topic.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 에이전틱 AI가 다문화 마케팅을 포함한 전체 마케팅 생태계를 어떻게 변화시킬지 준비해야 합니다. 대형 소매업체와 미디어 그룹의 관점을 참고하여 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must prepare for how agentic AI will transform the entire marketing ecosystem including multicultural marketing. Strategy development should reference perspectives from major retailers and media groups.
key_points: Industry experts discuss agentic AI's marketing transformation
Multicultural marketing considerations in AI implementation
Major retailers and media groups share insights
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 AI는 다문화 마케팅을 포함한 전체 마케팅 패러다임을 근본적으로 변화시키고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Agentic AI is fundamentally transforming the entire marketing paradigm including multicultural strategies.

title: 30 days of using za’atar the wrong way: How spice startup Hayati used repetition to hit 21,000 Instagram followers
description: With almost no budget to run ads, the founder of new za’atar brand Hayati set out to gain social media followers via a strategic Instagram Reels series.
title_en: Spice Startup Hayati Gains 21,000 Instagram Followers Through Strategic Repetition
summary_ko: 향신료 스타트업 Hayati가 광고 예산 없이 전략적인 Instagram Reels 시리즈를 통해 21,000명의 팔로워를 확보했습니다. 창업자는 30일 동안 za'atar를 잘못 사용하는 콘텐츠를 반복적으로 게시했습니다. 반복적인 콘텐츠 전략으로 소셜미디어 성장을 이룬 사례입니다.
summary_en: Spice startup Hayati gained 21,000 Instagram followers through strategic Instagram Reels series without advertising budget. The founder repeatedly posted content about using za'atar incorrectly for 30 days. This represents a case of social media growth achieved through repetitive content strategy.
so_what_ko: 예산이 제한된 D2C 스타트업도 창의적이고 반복적인 콘텐츠 전략으로 유기적 성장을 달성할 수 있습니다. 제품의 독특한 사용법을 활용한 콘텐츠 시리즈가 효과적인 브랜딩 도구가 될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Budget-constrained D2C startups can achieve organic growth through creative and repetitive content strategies. Product-focused content series showcasing unique usage can become effective branding tools.
key_points: Zero-budget social media strategy achieves 21,000 followers
30-day repetitive content series drives engagement
Creative product usage content builds brand awareness
one_line_insight_ko: 예산 없이도 창의적인 반복 콘텐츠 전략으로 D2C 브랜드의 유기적 성장이 가능합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Creative repetitive content strategies enable organic D2C brand growth even without advertising budget.

title: Tractor Supply taps real customers for ads to stand out from AI-generated content
description: Tractor Supply is leaning into real customers, local events and multi-channel marketing to drive spring traffic -- especially in an age where customers are increasingly wary of AI-generated content.
title_en: Tractor Supply uses real customers in ads to counter AI-generated content fatigue
summary_ko: 트랙터 서플라이는 AI 생성 콘텐츠에 지친 고객들에게 차별화된 경험을 제공하기 위해 실제 고객을 활용한 광고 전략을 채택했다. 회사는 실제 고객, 지역 이벤트, 멀티채널 마케팅을 통해 봄철 매장 방문을 늘리는 데 집중하고 있다. 소비자들이 AI 생성 콘텐츠에 대한 경계심을 높이고 있는 상황에서 진정성 있는 마케팅 접근법을 선택한 것이다.
summary_en: Tractor Supply is leveraging real customers in its advertising to differentiate from AI-generated content that consumers are increasingly wary of. The company is focusing on authentic customer stories, local events, and multi-channel marketing to drive spring traffic to stores. This strategy represents a counter-movement to the proliferation of AI-generated marketing content in the retail space.
so_what_ko: AI 콘텐츠 포화 시대에 고객의 진정성 있는 경험과 스토리텔링이 차별화 요소로 부상하고 있어, LG D2C는 실제 고객 후기와 지역 커뮤니티 중심의 마케팅 전략을 강화해야 한다.
so_what_en: As consumers grow weary of AI-generated content, authentic customer experiences and storytelling become key differentiators, requiring LG D2C to strengthen real customer testimonials and community-focused marketing strategies.
key_points: Tractor Supply chooses real customers over AI-generated content for ads
Multi-channel marketing approach includes local events and authentic storytelling
Consumer wariness of AI content creates opportunity for authentic marketing
one_line_insight_ko: AI 콘텐츠 피로감이 증가하는 환경에서 실제 고객 스토리가 새로운 마케팅 차별화 요소로 부상하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Authentic customer stories are emerging as a new marketing differentiator as AI content fatigue grows among consumers.

title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.
title_en: Amazon's AWS cloud business surges while capital spending accelerates for AI infrastructure
summary_ko: 아마존의 클라우드 사업부문인 AWS가 예상보다 높은 수익을 기록하며 급성장하고 있다. 하지만 AI 인프라 구축을 위한 자본 지출도 크게 증가하고 있으며, 이러한 투자는 단기적으로 계속될 예정이다. 아마존 CEO는 이러한 대규모 투자가 장기적 성장을 위해 필요하다고 설명했다.
summary_en: Amazon's AWS cloud division is experiencing stronger than expected growth, generating significant revenue gains. However, the company is also dramatically increasing capital spending on AI infrastructure, with the CEO indicating this investment trend will continue in the near term. The massive spending reflects Amazon's commitment to maintaining its competitive position in the AI and cloud computing markets.
so_what_ko: 아마존의 대규모 AI 인프라 투자는 클라우드 기반 AI 서비스의 경쟁이 치열해질 것임을 시사하며, LG D2C는 AI 기술 활용을 위한 클라우드 파트너십 전략을 재검토해야 한다.
so_what_en: Amazon's massive AI infrastructure investment signals intensifying competition in cloud-based AI services, requiring LG D2C to reassess cloud partnership strategies for AI technology adoption.
key_points: AWS revenue growth exceeds expectations driven by AI demand
Amazon significantly increasing capital spending on AI infrastructure
Long-term investment strategy despite near-term cost pressures
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존의 AI 인프라 대규모 투자는 클라우드 기반 AI 서비스 시장의 격화되는 경쟁을 예고한다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon's massive AI infrastructure investment signals intensifying competition in the cloud-based AI services market.

title: Home Depot helps advertisers reach DIY audiences on Reddit and Pinterest
description: Advertisers will be able to launch Reddit campaigns directly through Orange Apron Media’s self-service portal as part of an industry-first integration.
title_en: Home Depot launches industry-first Reddit integration to help advertisers reach DIY audiences
summary_ko: 홈데포가 광고주들이 DIY 고객층에 도달할 수 있도록 레딧과 핀터레스트 플랫폼을 활용하는 새로운 광고 서비스를 시작했다. 특히 오렌지 에이프런 미디어의 셀프서비스 포털을 통해 레딧 캠페인을 직접 실행할 수 있는 업계 최초의 통합 서비스를 제공한다. 이는 전문적인 DIY 커뮤니티에 직접 접근할 수 있는 혁신적인 광고 솔루션이다.
summary_en: Home Depot is launching a new advertising service that helps advertisers reach DIY audiences through Reddit and Pinterest platforms. The company offers an industry-first integration allowing advertisers to launch Reddit campaigns directly through Orange Apron Media's self-service portal. This innovative approach provides direct access to engaged DIY communities on social platforms.
so_what_ko: 홈데포의 소셜 플랫폼 통합 광고 서비스는 틈새 커뮤니티 타겟팅의 새로운 표준을 제시하며, LG D2C도 특화된 고객 커뮤니티를 활용한 광고 플랫폼 개발을 고려해야 한다.
so_what_en: Home Depot's social platform advertising integration sets a new standard for niche community targeting, suggesting LG D2C should consider developing advertising platforms that leverage specialized customer communities.
key_points: Industry-first Reddit integration through Orange Apron Media portal
Targeting DIY audiences across Reddit and Pinterest platforms
Self-service advertising portal for direct campaign management
one_line_insight_ko: 홈데포의 소셜 플랫폼 통합 광고는 특화된 커뮤니티 타겟팅이 새로운 마케팅 기회임을 보여준다.
one_line_insight_en: Home Depot's social platform integration demonstrates that specialized community targeting represents a new marketing opportunity.

title: Carve Designs shares approach toward AI agents’ traffic
description:
Carve Designs is “actively blocking traffic from AI agents,” cofounder Thayer Sylvester told Digital Commerce 360. It has also invested in technology to do so, she said. But that strategy could change, she explained. The decision comes at a time when ecommerce technology providers Shopify and Salesforce have created integrations with large-language models (LLMs) such […]
The post Carve Designs shares approach toward AI agents’ traffic appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Carve Designs actively blocks AI agent traffic while keeping future options open
summary_ko: 카브 디자인스는 현재 AI 에이전트 트래픽을 적극적으로 차단하고 있으며, 이를 위한 기술에도 투자했다고 공동창립자가 밝혔다. 하지만 이러한 전략은 향후 변경될 수 있다고 설명했다. 이는 쇼피파이와 세일즈포스 같은 이커머스 기술 제공업체들이 대형 언어 모델과의 통합을 추진하고 있는 시점에서 나온 결정이다.
summary_en: Carve Designs is actively blocking traffic from AI agents and has invested in technology to do so, according to its cofounder Thayer Sylvester. However, she indicated that this strategy could change in the future. This decision comes as ecommerce technology providers like Shopify and Salesforce are creating integrations with large language models.
so_what_ko: 카브 디자인스의 AI 에이전트 차단 전략은 소규모 D2C 브랜드들이 AI 트래픽에 대해 신중한 접근을 취하고 있음을 보여주며, LG D2C는 AI 에이전트 대응 정책을 명확히 수립해야 한다.
so_what_en: Carve Designs' AI agent blocking strategy shows smaller D2C brands are taking cautious approaches to AI traffic, requiring LG D2C to establish clear policies for AI agent interactions.
key_points: Carve Designs actively blocks AI agent traffic with dedicated technology
Strategy remains flexible and could change based on market developments
Contrasts with major platforms integrating LLM capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: 소규모 D2C 브랜드들이 AI 에이전트 트래픽에 대해 신중한 접근을 취하며 선택적 차단 전략을 구사하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Small D2C brands are taking cautious approaches to AI agent traffic, implementing selective blocking strategies.

title: Sysco credits AI as sales rise 4.7% in Q3
description:
As Sysco Corporation’s AI360 platform tool entered its second calendar year of use, the wholesale restaurant food distributor announced that sales grew during its fiscal Q3 ended March 28. The company’s sales increased by 4.7% year over year to $20.5 billion, results that Kevin Hourican, chair of the board and CEO at Sysco, called “strong.” […]
The post Sysco credits AI as sales rise 4.7% in Q3 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Sysco credits AI platform for driving 4.7% sales growth in Q3
summary_ko: 시스코 코퍼레이션의 AI360 플랫폼이 사용 2년차를 맞으면서, 회사는 3분기 매출이 4.7% 증가한 205억 달러를 기록했다고 발표했다. 케빈 후리칸 CEO는 이러한 실적을 '강력한' 성과라고 평가했다. 도매 레스토랑 식품 유통업체인 시스코는 AI 기술 활용이 매출 성장에 직접적으로 기여했다고 밝혔다.
summary_en: Sysco Corporation reported 4.7% year-over-year sales growth to $20.5 billion in Q3, crediting its AI360 platform tool which entered its second year of use. CEO Kevin Hourican called the results 'strong' performance for the wholesale restaurant food distributor. The company directly attributes AI technology implementation to driving sales growth.
so_what_ko: 시스코의 AI360 플랫폼을 통한 매출 성장 사례는 B2B 유통 분야에서 AI 활용의 실질적 효과를 입증하며, LG D2C도 AI 기반 매출 최적화 도구 도입을 적극 검토해야 한다.
so_what_en: Sysco's AI360-driven sales growth demonstrates tangible AI benefits in B2B distribution, suggesting LG D2C should actively consider AI-powered sales optimization tools.
key_points: AI360 platform in second year of implementation drives measurable results
4.7% sales growth attributed directly to AI technology
Demonstrates AI's proven impact in wholesale distribution sector
one_line_insight_ko: 시스코의 AI360 플랫폼 성공 사례는 AI 기술이 실질적인 매출 성장을 이끌 수 있음을 입증한다.
one_line_insight_en: Sysco's AI360 platform success proves that AI technology can drive tangible sales growth results.

title: UPS executives share impact of fuel costs on Q1, outlook for Q2
description:
The United Parcel Service (UPS) revenue declined in its fiscal Q1, as war in Iran brought volatility to both fuel prices and supply chains. UPS executives, on the carrier’s Q1 earnings call with analysts, discussed the impact of fuel costs on their business. Ultimately, UPS revenue in its fiscal Q1 2026 declined to $21.2 billion […]
The post UPS executives share impact of fuel costs on Q1, outlook for Q2 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: UPS Revenue Drops to $21.2B as Iran War Drives Fuel Price Volatility
summary_ko: UPS의 1분기 매출이 212억 달러로 감소했습니다. 이란 전쟁으로 인한 연료 가격 변동성과 공급망 차질이 주요 원인으로 지목됩니다. UPS 경영진은 연료비 상승이 사업에 미치는 영향을 분석하며 2분기 전망을 논의했습니다.
summary_en: UPS reported declining revenue of $21.2 billion in fiscal Q1 2026. The war in Iran created volatility in fuel prices and supply chain disruptions affecting operations. UPS executives discussed fuel cost impacts and provided outlook for Q2 during earnings call.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 물류 비용 상승은 D2C 브랜드의 배송비 증가로 이어져 고객 경험과 수익성에 직접적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Rising global logistics costs could directly impact D2C brands through increased shipping expenses, affecting customer experience and profitability.
key_points: UPS Q1 2026 revenue declined to $21.2 billion
Iran war created fuel price volatility and supply chain disruptions
Management discussed fuel cost impacts on earnings call
one_line_insight_ko: 지정학적 리스크가 물류 비용 상승을 통해 D2C 비즈니스 수익성에 직접적 위협 요소로 작용하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Geopolitical risks are becoming direct threats to D2C business profitability through rising logistics costs.

title: Fossil sees 57% brand recall lift with InMobi’s full-funnel ad solution
description: Using the Ad Experiences solution, the watchmaker achieved 20.5 million total impressions and a unique reach of 7.1 million for its spring campaign.
title_en: Fossil Achieves 57% Brand Recall Boost with InMobi's Full-Funnel Ad Platform
summary_ko: Fossil이 InMobi의 풀퍼널 광고 솔루션을 통해 브랜드 인지도를 57% 향상시켰습니다. 봄 캠페인에서 총 2,050만 노출수와 710만 유니크 리치를 달성했습니다. Ad Experiences 솔루션이 전체 마케팅 퍼널에서 효과적인 성과를 보여줬습니다.
summary_en: Fossil achieved a 57% brand recall lift using InMobi's full-funnel advertising solution. The spring campaign generated 20.5 million total impressions and reached 7.1 million unique users. The Ad Experiences platform demonstrated effectiveness across the entire marketing funnel.
so_what_ko: 풀퍼널 광고 플랫폼은 D2C 브랜드의 인지도부터 전환까지 통합적 성과 개선을 가능하게 하는 핵심 마케팅 도구로 부상하고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Full-funnel advertising platforms are emerging as essential marketing tools enabling integrated performance improvements from awareness to conversion for D2C brands.
key_points: 57% brand recall improvement achieved
20.5 million impressions and 7.1 million unique reach
Full-funnel approach proved effective for watchmaker brand
one_line_insight_ko: 풀퍼널 광고 플랫폼이 브랜드 인지도와 리치 확대에서 입증된 성과를 보여주며 D2C 마케팅의 새로운 표준으로 자리잡고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Full-funnel advertising platforms are establishing themselves as the new standard for D2C marketing with proven results in brand awareness and reach expansion.

title: Coors Light elongates name to celebrate World Cup goals
description: The campaign, which includes a national ad spot by Droga5, is also timed to the brand’s release of its first nonalcoholic beer next month.
title_en: Coors Light Extends Brand Name to Celebrate World Cup Goals
summary_ko: Coors Light가 월드컵 골 기념을 위해 브랜드명을 확장하는 캠페인을 진행합니다. Droga5가 제작한 전국 광고 스팟이 포함된 이번 캠페인은 브랜드의 첫 무알코올 맥주 출시와 맞물려 진행됩니다. 창의적인 브랜드 네이밍 전략으로 소비자 관심을 끌고 있습니다.
summary_en: Coors Light is running a campaign that elongates the brand name to celebrate World Cup goals. The campaign includes a national ad spot created by Droga5 and coincides with the brand's first nonalcoholic beer launch. The creative brand naming strategy aims to capture consumer attention.
so_what_ko: 스포츠 이벤트와 연계한 창의적 브랜드 네이밍 전략은 D2C 브랜드가 화제성을 만들고 제품 출시를 효과적으로 알릴 수 있는 마케팅 기법입니다.
so_what_en: Creative brand naming strategies tied to sports events offer D2C brands an effective marketing technique to generate buzz and promote product launches.
key_points: Brand name elongation tied to World Cup goals
National ad campaign by Droga5
Timed with first nonalcoholic beer launch
one_line_insight_ko: 스포츠 이벤트와 연계한 창의적 브랜딩은 제품 출시 타이밍을 극대화하는 효과적인 마케팅 전술로 활용되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Creative branding tied to sports events is being leveraged as an effective marketing tactic to maximize product launch timing.

title: Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations to automate back-office work
description:
New AI agents aim to cut manual tasks and speed up workflows across disconnected systems in the back office.
The post Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations to automate back-office work appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Salesforce Launches Agentforce Operations for Back-Office Automation
summary_ko: Salesforce가 백오피스 업무 자동화를 위한 Agentforce Operations를 출시했습니다. 새로운 AI 에이전트는 수작업 업무를 줄이고 연결되지 않은 시스템 간의 워크플로우를 가속화하는 것을 목표로 합니다. 백오피스 운영 효율성 향상에 중점을 두고 있습니다.
summary_en: Salesforce launched Agentforce Operations to automate back-office work processes. The new AI agents aim to reduce manual tasks and accelerate workflows across disconnected systems. The focus is on improving back-office operational efficiency.
so_what_ko: AI 에이전트 기반 백오피스 자동화는 D2C 운영 효율성을 높이고 인건비를 절감하여 고객 서비스에 더 많은 자원을 집중할 수 있게 합니다.
so_what_en: AI agent-based back-office automation enables D2C operations to improve efficiency and reduce labor costs, allowing more resources to focus on customer service.
key_points: Agentforce Operations launched for back-office automation
AI agents reduce manual tasks across disconnected systems
Focus on accelerating workflows and operational efficiency
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트가 백오피스 자동화를 통해 D2C 운영의 핵심 효율성 혁신을 주도하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI agents are driving core operational efficiency innovation in D2C through back-office automation.

title: What vibe coding misses and what open source gets right
description:
As AI-driven development accelerates, ownership and maintenance questions grow. Here’s how open source offers a path forward.
The post What vibe coding misses and what open source gets right appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Open Source Development Model Offers Path Forward for AI-Driven Coding
summary_ko: AI 기반 개발이 가속화되면서 소유권과 유지보수 문제가 증가하고 있습니다. 바이브 코딩의 한계가 드러나고 있는 상황에서 오픈소스가 해결책을 제시합니다. 오픈소스 모델이 AI 개발의 미래 방향성을 제시하고 있습니다.
summary_en: As AI-driven development accelerates, ownership and maintenance questions are growing. Vibe coding limitations are becoming apparent while open source offers solutions. The open source model is providing future direction for AI development.
so_what_ko: D2C 기술 개발에서 오픈소스 접근법은 AI 도구의 투명성과 지속가능성을 보장하여 장기적 기술 전략의 핵심이 될 것입니다.
so_what_en: Open source approaches in D2C technology development will become central to long-term tech strategy by ensuring transparency and sustainability of AI tools.
key_points: AI development creating ownership and maintenance challenges
Vibe coding showing limitations
Open source provides sustainable development path
one_line_insight_ko: 오픈소스 개발 모델이 AI 시대의 지속가능한 기술 전략을 위한 핵심 접근법으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Open source development models are emerging as the key approach for sustainable technology strategy in the AI era.
